title: About ULPs and scripts
description: User language programs (ULP) and scripts to automate common tasks are supplied with Electronics, but users can also write their own.
content:
# About ULPs and scripts

User language programs (ULP) and scripts to automate common tasks are supplied with Electronics, but users can also write their own. 

A ULP is a program that runs inside Electronics, written in any text editor, using C-like syntax.

A script is a series of Electronics commands.

 
 
 
 
 **Parent page:** Automation scripts
